description: Marketing insight for business owners & smooth internet access for customers
author: 𝕴𝖘𝖒𝖆𝖎𝖑 �.
pros: The software is good for facilitating customers while they use wifi & helps business owners know who is their most valued customers.
cons: I have used it for consecutive days a few years back and I was getting more than what I wanted.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Bruno M.
pros: It made the rollout of our different client base much easier. made it easy to implement, and above all to manage. it was feature rich, and worked with different set of access point models that could cater for the different budgets of clients. even if a client used a more inexpensive model, it would still pack all the features built into the tanaza cloud. the type of analytics provided made sure our customers would benefit beyond the service they were getting from us, and made the return of investment much easier. support was excelent, whenever we had an issue they were all resolved in a timely manner with little to no impact to clients businesses. if there was a hardware issue, it was very straightforward to replace the access point and still keep the same configuration of the client. price wise its very easy to understand, and a good bang for the buck that we were getting for the service.
cons: there are definitely a few things that can be better. there is still missing integration with some access point brands for some of our clients.

author: Stuart D.
pros: There is nothing that I liked as I was forced tis way, only to find I couldn't then use as expected
cons: I came to Tanaza from another Open Mesh platform on the basis that they could reflash my devices to their OS and then I could utilise their setup. Whilst this was true, I wasn't aware of the cost until after I'd flashed my units 0 by which time I couldn't go back, and secondly and more importantly, the functionality was not the same as the prior (now defunct) platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: We can easily monitor all end devices which just a click and effecting changes remotely and in real time.
author: Israel O.
pros: The Classic hotspot features are very great with real time analytics. I do love the simplicity of easy navigation especially on Tanaza Classic . Product is easier to use as well. Integrating Tanaza into our business has been of great help.
cons: I believe the features are very great to use. With the hotspot features there can be an integration to use front end languages. This will make designing plash pages much more interactive than rather relying much on external captive portal or on images that makes loading of pages slow down. Integration into our business was awesome.

description: We were looking for a low-cost, easy-to-use public Wi-Fi platform that makes the management of multiple Wi-Fi deployments nice and simple and Tanaza have absolutely nailed it. We're very happy with the platform and can't wait to see what the guys there will come up with next.
author: Brendan W.
pros: We spent some time researching various solutions in the market and Tanaza simply offers the best value for money public Wi-Fi platform that we could find. It is very easy to use, supports a range of low-cost Wi-Fi hardware options and works very, very well. Good functionality for public Wi-Fi, the fact that you can manage all your Access Points from the one portal is a real bonus, along with their great CMS for splash pages.
cons: Looking forward to seeing more reporting from the platform and closer integration with web filtering.

description: We have used Tanaza in some places with the main purpose to get used to it and to plan large schale implementations. So far we confirm that TanazaOS perform according to the specs.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is very unique to see an independent Operation System like Tanaza that is able to create, manage and operate an wireless network regardless Access Points brands and locations. This solution is very competitive in regards to price and functionality compare with other cloud managed solution in the market. TanazaOS is as well very versatile when it get combined with other software platforms in Wi-Fi management industry.
cons: Since TanazaOS is new in the market there are still a lot of marketing effort to be done in the way to gain clients confidence in the market.

review_title: A solid platform with a solid team behind it!
description: Quickly realized that this software is built with much love and care. Great work!
author: Greig K.
pros: I LOVE: 1. The ease of use. Front office & Back office. All around! 2. Remote accessibility. 3. Affordability. 4. Great quick support. 5. Capturing our user data, in such an easy and organized way.
cons: No cons that I can really think of, honestly.

review_title: Tanaza Best WiFi Portal Marketing for Enterprise
description: - its very good that we can design the portal advertising by using tanaza, its flexible for the wifi marketing, also convinience for the user as well when they try to connect to free wifi.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Easy to mange the portal and deploy from the cloud to the AP. - Well support with various devices such as Unifi. - Easy to setup not complex at all, download firmware, deploy and manage. - all in one centralized all the devices from the cloud.
cons: - Firmware not yet support for all vendor yet, i hope tanaza will work on this more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Impressive, highly happy and amazingly satisfying
author: Wajdy Z.
pros: The cloud management portal is one of the simplest and most intuitive
cons: Wider support to more access points and local controller deployment capability

author: Wael M.
pros: Distinctive things, ease of use ... and high quality
cons: Lack of support for the Arabic language.

description: Pur essendo un prodotto complesso, complessivamente mi ha stupito
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Numerose funzionalità e in continuo aumento, interfaccia chiara, prestazioni e reattività
cons: Prezzo e licenze, supporto hardware ancora limitato
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Super rápido e prático para o usuário novo
cons: Muito caro pois o preço é muito alto e não tem como
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Très bon produit, rapide, optimisé et simple d’utilisation
author: Esaie S.
pros: Le produit est très facile à utiliser et a déployer
cons: Oui le design a besoin d’être améliorer pour une bonne expérience client

description: Sencillo de usar y poner en servicio equipamiento wifi tan variado, nosotros partimos con equipos de muy bajo costo por ejemplo.
author: Juan Pablo V.
pros: Usamos con frecuencia este software para administrar a nuestros clientes con sus zonas WiFi, lo que nos ha permitido ademas, facilitar una plataforma de marketing a nuestros Clientes como campañas de mailing masivo Nos gusta la facilidad del software para trabajar, permitiendo cosas tan sencillas como sacar una foto con el smartphone y pasarlo al portal cautivo.
cons: Desearia poder conocer un poco mas sobre como poder filtrar contenido web

description: Ho trovato una piattaforma unica per gestire i sistemi WiFi complessi con risultati ottimi, e comunque con un costo dell'hardware compatibile con il nostro business. Il risultato ha soddisfatto le esigenze dei nostri clienti.
author: Giorgio C.
pros: Il sistema cloud è di certo la peculiarità più importante, soprattutto perchè, parlando di AP, altri cloud non permettono l'intera gestione del sistema e la configurazione dell'apparato.
cons: Alcune funzionalità non mi sono ben chiare, forse un webinar potrebbe essere utile. Il costo della licenza per adeguare hardware esistente, è a mio avviso eccessivo. Per questo motivo abbiamo acquistato direttamente gli AP suggeriti da Tanaza con il software già installato

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Perfetto avere una sola piattaforma di gestione per tutti gli access point (anche di produttori diversi) controllabili da remoto, semplifica tantissimo aggiornamenti, configurazioni e anche la ricerca dei problemi.
cons: Funziona egregiamente, un solo consiglio, più setup preconfigurati ci sono più può diventare semplice anche per chi ha meno tempo o meno esperienza tecnica.

review_title: LA IDEA ES BUENA, el problema es google
description: buena, salvo el problema de google
author: Marco I.
pros: Lo intenté implementar, pero daba fallos cuando cambió la versión de google, después la propia evolución del sector de las telecomunicaciones hicieron el resto
cons: Que no puede saltarse el problema de google, que detecta el portal cautivo

review_title: La solution simple que je recherchais!
author: Mariama T.
pros: Enfin, je peux tirer profit, grâce à un simple outil, de mon installation internet. Je peux faire mes publicités, savoir qui utilise mon réseau et personnaliser encore mieux mes offres grâce à Tanaza.
cons: il faut acheter un routeur particulier, ce qui est un surcout mais pas si grave au final

review_title: Il TOP per la gestione delle reti wireless
description: Esperienza complessiva positiva, un plauso all'assistenza che risponde tempestivamente a qualunque quesito.
author: Matteo M.
pros: Qualità del software al top, permette di gestire da remoto utilizzando un'unica piattaforma la rete wireless della propria azienda. Molti produttori di apparecchi IT implementano al loro interno piattaforme proprietarie ma la maggior parte delle volte non è all'altezza e pecca in qualche funzione. Con Tanaza invece sei certo di avere un software impeccabile che ti garantisce la possibilità di gestire in maniera semplice (dopo aver fatto un po' di pratica) e veloce la tua rete.
cons: Per quanto riguarda le note dolenti non ce ne sono molte, anzi. La problematica che ho riscontrato si è risolta nel breve tempo, dopo essermi abituato al sistema. La presenza di numerose funzioni è forse lo scoglio iniziale ma dopo essersi abituati si configura il tutto senza problemi e anche fuori ufficio.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Andre C.
pros: The platform makes it easy to configure and deploy once the device firmware has been flashed.
cons: My biggest issue with Tanaza is that for the brand equipments that I use, I have to load the Tanaza OS onto these devices. This makes it harder to interoperate with existing customer networks and also poses a challenge when the customer already has a fully built customised wireless network.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Nunca pude lograr una propuesta ajustada al presupuesto
author: Roberto R.
pros: Funciona correctamente con las funcionalidades que menciona.
cons: Costo muy elevado para lo que hace, no se tienen esquemas de venta correcto. No esta pensado para paises de Latinoamerica.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I had problem with my WiFi, actually i need a feature that could schedule the restart on APs.
author: Sen R.
pros: This cloud WiFi app helps us very much, as I had used it to manage all my APs on it.
cons: But this software need improvement regarding supporting multi vendors.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Nerlin M.
pros: Muy fácil su uso, con interfaces muy intuitivas y amigables con el usuario
cons: La integración de procesos es un poco lenta
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: William M.
pros: Splash page editor and ability to embed videos and images as adverts
cons: Difficulty when installing on Mikrotik device. I do understand its as a result of how the manufacturer chooses to manage 3rd party software
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Per il momento è molto positiva, ho iniziato a usare tanaza agli albori e uno dei fondatori dell'azienda è stato molto gentile permettendomi di testare il sistema prima di acquistarlo. Il sistema è davvero semplice da utilzzare, mi permette di avere sotto controllo la situazione della nostra wifi pubblica distribuita su un intera montagna.
author: Ivano Z.
pros: Semplicità di uitilizzo, possibilità di avere gli access point "virtualmente" in un unica rete anche se fisicamente distanti. La possibilità di usare gli ap che uno preferisce (io uso ubiquiti e mikrotik). Bello il sistema per personalizzare la splash page, è facile e si ottengono subito buoni risultati. Uno dei punti di forza è anche il pannello delle statistiche che permette di vedere con semplicità l'utilizzo della rete. Insomma un sistema completo e facile da configurare.
cons: Soprattutto nei primi tempi c'era una difficoltà col roaming tra le varie antenne, il sistema richiedeva che l'utente aprisse una pagina internet per riattivare la connessione, questo era abbastanza fastidioso e dava l'impressione che internet non funzionasse. Adesso il roaming va meglio ma è ancora perfezionabile (non capisco perchè il sistema avendo il mac di chi è correttamente autenticato non riesce a far navigare immediatamente l'utente quando si sposta da un antenna ad un altra). Peccato che è sparita la possibilità di spingere l'utente a mettere il "mi piace" per connettersi, forse è una limitazione di Facebook ma sarebbe bello se tornasse. Non so se è cambiato qualcosa adesso, ma alcune installazioni di firmware erano un po' macchinose e richiedevano linux.
